The term 8udha means one who is Intelligent. The word Is derived
from the root. "Budha". to understand. The planet governs intellgence
as his name Implies.. Any type of education • be it scientific or philosophical
.. must necessarily have and enjoy the full support from this planet. A
man who is quic:k·witted or who is of erratic behaviour iS said to be
Mercurian in character.
Sharpness of intellect is bestowed by strongly placed Mercury. A
dull·witted person is governed by a badly placed or weak 8udha.
Mercury indicates one's temperament. intelligence. presence of
mind and argumentative nature. The superiority of human beings over
all other livi'lg beings is attributable to the force of the intellect generated
or govern«! by Budl'ta. Moon governs one's mind.
